creator: royger@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Bhavesh Davda from comment #20)
In this case I would prefer so. I don't know much about net, much less about dhclient, so I would like someone that knows to review that patch. Let's give it some time (let's wait until middle of next week), and then I will start putting more pressure if no-one has reviewed it.
